response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 13+ years of broad full-stack experience and genuine craftsmanship credentials (TDD, workshops, OSS tooling), but the role is a people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management, 3+ years of technical leadership, and developer-tools/build-infrastructure focus on a mobile platform. The resume shows no direct people-management experience (no reports, hiring, performance reviews, or roadmap ownership for a team), limited mobile-platform depth beyond a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago, and only tangential developer-tooling work (CI setup, test libraries, MCP generators) rather than dedicated build-systems/test-infrastructure leadership at scale.
strengths: Deep software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and test-tooling authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven teaching and technical-leadership signal via workshops, courses, and dojos
Polyglot senior IC with 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems
concerns: No evidence of formal people management — no direct reports, performance reviews, or hiring experience
Mobile-platform experience is thin and dated (one iOS/Apple TV role ~2015–2016)
Developer-tools work is fragmented across roles rather than a focused 3+ year track in build/test infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Strong craftsmanship and dev-tooling instincts (TDD, test frameworks, MCP tooling)
